search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Search was limited to lastzwiki.com. Best matches were the English heroes and laboratory pages; beginner guide is secondary context.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Hero roster page with character list, levels, factions, and equipment sections; useful for hero discovery and cross-checking hero-related pages.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero names, factions, levels, and hero equipment context.

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table page covering laboratory categories and badge costs per level; useful for research discovery and mechanic cross-validation.
results.primary_user_job: Check research categories and badge cost tables by level.

results.title: Beginner's Guide - Last Z Wiki | How to Start & Essential Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: Starter guide that mentions early heroes, alliances, resources, and progression flow; helpful for onboarding context around heroes and research.
results.primary_user_job: Understand early progression and where hero/research systems fit.

search_records.query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.searched_query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.search_notes: Search constrained to www.last-z.wiki returned no discoverable pages for the query. No leads found for topic discovery or cross-validation.
search_records.no_results_reason: No matching indexed pages found on the allowed domain for the requested query.

search_records.search_notes: Search was constrained to the approved domain only. No matching pages were found for the query within the freshness window.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed results matched the allowed domain query.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search was constrained to lastz.fandom.com only. Results prioritize concrete wiki pages related to heroes, research, and events. One result is not proof of mechanics, costs, or rewards; use cross-validation across these pages before drafting player-facing copy.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Regular world event that includes research-speed tasks under the Age of Science cycle and hero upgrade tasks under Hero Initiative.
results.primary_user_job: Map event cycles and point sources for research and hero growth planning.
claims_to_verify: Cycle names and order by day

results.title: Heroes | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core hero roster and power overview; useful for linking hero-related event tasks to hero leveling and fragments.
results.primary_user_job: Identify hero classes and power inputs that events may reward or consume.

results.title: Laboratory | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Research building page; confirms technologies research and lab unlock context tied to research-focused events.
results.primary_user_job: Cross-check research building unlocks and technology progression for event planning.

search_records.search_notes: Search restricted to www.packsify.com. No matching Packsify pages were found for the supplied query, so there are no discovery leads to return.
search_records.no_results_reason: No allowed-domain results matched the query within the search scope.

search_records.search_notes: Restricted to mmediamreza.com only. Results skew toward Last Z building guides, which are strong discovery leads for unit-training and base-capacity content. Search surfaced some off-topic/non-core pages as well, but only the most concrete Last Z-specific guide pages are included here.

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Training building page with level-by-level cap, speed, and power data for shooter units.
results.primary_user_job: Plan shooter training and upgrade timing.
claims_to_verify: Exact level table for cap, speed, and power

results.title: Rider Camp Guide: Train & Promote Rider Units | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Training building page with detailed rider level stats, including cap, speed, and power.
results.primary_user_job: Plan rider training and upgrade timing.
claims_to_verify: Exact level table for cap, speed, and power

results.title: Military Center Guide: Maximize Unit Cap & Base Power | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Base building page focused on unit cap growth and base power contribution.
results.primary_user_job: Track unit capacity and base power upgrades.
claims_to_verify: How unit cap differs from training cap
